label: Concrete and Affirmative Utopianism
definition: Visions grounded in material drives, repressed desires, or affirmative sociopolitical transformations...
coding_rule: Apply when the text discusses utopia as a material, affirmative, or holistic alternative...

label: Critical Dystopianism
definition: Negative or warning visions of society that, despite their dark depiction, maintain a site of resistance...
coding_rule: Apply when the text describes a negative or cautionary future vision that explicitly retains a space for hope...

label: Utopian Methodologies
definition: Methodologies of exploring utopian alternatives through structural exercises or active modeling...
coding_rule: Apply when the text indicates structural, participatory exploration methodologies...

label: Defamiliarization
definition: A formal literary or critical device used to render present realities unfamiliar to evaluate them...
coding_rule: Apply when the text explicitly points to rendering familiar systems unfamiliar as a tool for critique...

label: Hoping / Anticipating Consciousness
definition: An active, teachable dialectical capability ('docta spes') that rejects passivity and cultivates anticipation...
coding_rule: Apply when the text frames hope as an active, teachable, or structured socio-political drive...

label: Dystopian Impulses / Warnings
definition: Dystopian warnings that alert the audience to critical risks by extrapolating current trends...
coding_rule: Apply when the text frames dystopian thoughts as active warning systems to prevent negative futures...
